subcodes.first_line: We have revealed the Book and made manifest the clear evidences, yet the people remain in manifest error, hastening toward darkness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انزلنا الکتاب و اظهرنا البینات ولکن القوم فی ضلال مبین یسرعون الی الظلمه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God as sun
